title: Undead Horse Breeding
body:
# Undead Horse Breeding
Skeleton and zombie horses can't be bred in normal vanilla Minecraft. This plugin fixes this issue.

Using this plugin you can breed **Skeleton Horses** by feeding them **bone meal** and **Zombie Horses** by feeding them **red mushrooms**. No permissions or configurations are required. This plugin works out of the box.

# Demo video
